{"BaseResp":{"StatusCode":0,"StatusMessage":"success"},"code":0,"data":{"common_list_info":{"cursor":"","has_more":false,"log_extra":{"recommend_info":"{"channel_id":"","request_id":"202603221923569F4DA382B99803F13415"}"},"total":1},"data_list":[{"comment":{"comment_id":"7613031044010509081","common":{"comment_type":-90,"content":{"image_data_list":{},"text":"寡淡无味呢"},"content_type":0,"create_timestamp":1772548525,"group_id":"7431965408090917913","service_id":2,"status":1,"user_info":{"base_info":{"description":"世间行乐亦如此，古来万事东流水","encode_user_id":"#c1967_MTk2NzE5NjcxOTY3MTk2N2CasPSOBGa1Z5ZZ9NNw5zU6UOQmGwnbzBv1aYMQzhZz","gender":1,"is_cancelled":false,"profile_gender":1,"user_avatar":"http://p3-reading-sign.fqnovelpic.com/tos-cn-i-1yzifmftcy/0474c06f99974cb8ac062500b6bc875f~tplv-s85hriknmn-jpeg-v1:144:0.jpeg?lk3s=9b9bd2b1&x-expires=1776708926&x-signature=Z%2BjImzczuQaatXJljCQgpAluqD8%3D","user_id":"1222267036767463","user_name":"歌会跑调"},"expand_extra":{},"user_id":"1222267036767463","user_relation":{"can_follow":true,"relation_type":1},"user_tag":{"fan_rank_num":0,"fan_ranklist_title":"","is_author":false,"is_blue_vip":false,"is_cp":false,"is_official_cert":false,"is_vip":false,"sticker":{"expire_time":1710524880,"is_worn":true,"sticker":{"add_context":"","bg_color":"#E4F5CD","can_worn":false,"id":3,"name":"烂尾督察员","small_url":"https://p6-novel.byteimg.com/origin/novel-static/972e1bec4437ce8e045aaf8e3bbfe1aa","sticker_type":1,"url":"https://p6-novel.byteimg.com/origin/novel-static/47aabaca7b644a2b0eb9d35477c6d9df"}},"user_title_info":[]}}},"expand":{"book_id":"7431965408090917913","book_info":{"abstract":"【游泳+系统+热血+打脸+爽文+为国争光】
在偶像孙杨遭遇不公，国内泳坛至暗之时，天才选手林海心灰意冷，递交了退役申请。

一夜之间，【泳破苍穹系统】降临！开局任务，便是打破孙杨那被视为丰碑的全国纪录！

从此，泳坛迎来了它的暴君。国内赛场上，他撕碎退役书，宣言要改写历史；世锦赛的泳池里，他碾压澳洲名将，四枚金牌狠狠打脸傲慢的西方媒体——“你们做不到，不代表我做不到！”

但这仅仅是开始。他的目光，早已投向那尘封十五年、被视为菲尔普斯神迹的世界纪录！

巴黎奥运会，他放出豪言要包揽七金！全球哗然，嘲讽与质疑如潮水般涌来。直到他站上赛道，以非人的姿态将所有纪录踩在脚下，成为泳池里唯一的王！

这是一个龙国少年，携系统之威，横扫世界泳坛，终结欧美垄断，成就千古一帝的传奇！","audio_thumb_uri":"https://p6-novel.byteimg.com/img/novel-pic/p2o3c85b4647557b0194faf680098f1095e~tplv-tt-cs0:440:440.image","author":"糠酸莫米松不会过敏","author_id":"","book_id":"7431965408090917913","book_name":"游泳：开局继承孙杨称霸世界泳坛","book_short_name":"","book_type":"0","color_dominate":"#68b8d0","creation_status":"1","genre":"0","genre_type":"0","read_count_text":"潜力好书","reader_schema":{"authorize_type":"1","category_schema":"[{"category_id":746,"name":"游戏体育","schema":"dragon1967://newCategoryDetail?id=746&name=游戏体育&genre_type=0&gender=1&source=detail"},{"category_id":19,"name":"系统","schema":"dragon1967://newCategoryDetail?id=19&name=系统&genre_type=0&gender=1&source=detail"},{"category_id":90,"name":"天才","schema":"dragon1967://newCategoryDetail?id=90&name=天才&genre_type=0&gender=1&source=detail"},{"category_id":15,"name":"体育","schema":"dragon1967://newCategoryDetail?id=15&name=体育&genre_type=0&gender=1&source=detail"},{"category_id":453,"name":"开局","schema":"dragon1967://newCategoryDetail?id=453&name=开局&genre_type=0&gender=1&source=detail"}]","first_chapter_item_id":"7610724072820851225","read_count":"296","title_page_tags":"","word_number":"131045"},"relate_post_id":"","relate_post_schema":"","score":"0","serial_count":"26","tags":"游戏体育,体育,系统,开局,天才","thumb_url":"https://p3-reading-sign.fqnovelpic.com/novel-pic/p2o3c85b4647557b0194faf680098f1095e~tplv-noop.image?lk3s=9b9bd2b1&x-expires=1779362637&x-signature=%2BC1TJjvRXanI%2BBSNLWoQzki%2B3Hg%3D","tomato_book_status":"1"},"book_info_list":[],"common_stat":{},"creator_id":"4396267504670852","extra":{"comment_jump_schema":"","novelapp_read_item_cnt":"11"},"log_extra":{"recommend_info":"{"channel_id":"","request_id":"202603221923569F4DA382B99803F13415"}"},"relate_info_list":[],"reply_show_count":0,"reply_show_row":0,"score":"6","score_suffix_text":"阅读不足30分钟后点评"},"stat":{"digg_count":0,"forwarded_count":0,"listen_duration":0,"read_book_count":0,"read_duration":1799,"reply_count":0,"show_pv":42
